title: Entangled seal rescued at Great Brak beach
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A seal was freed from...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A seal was freed from entanglement on a beach in Great Brak River this afternoon, 24 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A seal was freed from entanglement on a beach in Great Brak River this afternoon, 24 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Stranded Marine Animal Rescue Team (Smart) had received a call to rescue a seal near De Vette Mossel, and immediately, volunteers were sent out."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Upon arrival, the Smart volunteers found the seal with deep lacerations to its neck and body, caused by fishing line it had become entangled in.","html":"Upon arrival, the Smart volunteers found the seal with deep lacerations to its neck and body, caused by fishing line it had become entangled in."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The volunteers monitored the seal while personnel from the Garden Route SPCA's Mossel Bay branch made their way to the beach, equipped with a hoop from Smart's storage to help immobilise the seal.","html":"The volunteers monitored the seal while personnel from the Garden Route SPCA's Mossel Bay branch made their way to the beach, equipped with a hoop from Smart's storage to help immobilise the seal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When the SPCA arrived, the seal was immobilised in the hoop and the fishing line was removed before the seal returned to the sea.","html":"When the SPCA arrived, the seal was immobilised in the hoop and the fishing line was removed before the seal returned to the sea."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This incident once again illustrates the importance of cooperation between like-minded organisations,\" said Smart.","html":"\"This incident once again illustrates the importance of cooperation between like-minded organisations,\" said Smart."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The organisation thanked everyone who was involved with detangling and rescuing the seal.","html":"The organisation thanked everyone who was involved with detangling and rescuing the seal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Entangled seal rescued at Great Brak beach
